channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BLUSPRING] Bluspring Enterprises Acquires STEAG Energy Services India, Boosting Industrial Vertical with 7 GW Managed Assets
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bluspring Enterprises Limited has announced the acquisition of STEAG Energy Services India Private Limited through its subsidiary Bluspring New Horizon One Private Limited. The acquisition, which includes two subsidiaries of STEAG India, is expected to close within the next 60-90 days. STEAG India is a leading service provider in Operations and Maintenance (O&M), Digital Solutions, and Engineering & Management Advisory Services to the power and energy industry across India and overseas markets. The acquisition will significantly enhance Bluspring's capabilities in upstream and downstream power services, accelerate its expansion in the power infrastructure market, and strengthen its presence in the industrial services segment. The transaction is expected to be margin and EPS-accretive, enhancing Bluspring's return on equity profile and creating long-term value for shareholders.

  • Bluspring to acquire 100% shareholding in STEAG Energy Services India Private Limited
  • STEAG India is a leading service provider in Operations and Maintenance (O&M), Digital Solutions, and Engineering & Management Advisory Services
  • STEAG India manages nearly 7 GW of power assets and 2,200 TPH of process steam supply capacity
  • Acquisition will enhance Bluspring's capabilities in upstream and downstream power services
  • Transaction expected to be margin and EPS-accretive, enhancing Bluspring's return on equity profile

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bluspring Enterprises Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [IBREALEST] Embassy Developments: Stayed NCLT Order, NCLAT Hearing on April 10, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Embassy Developments Ltd. provides an update on the proceedings before the Hon'ble National Company Law Appellate Tribunal (NCLAT), Principal Bench, New Delhi. The NCLAT hearing took place on March 19, 2026, where the Respondents were granted an adjournment with a warning that no further adjournment would be allowed. The matter is now listed for submissions and further proceedings on April 10, 2026. The impugned NCLT order admitting the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) remains stayed, rendering it inoperative and halting all related proceedings. The Company assures that it remains fully operational and financially sound.

  • Embassy Developments Ltd. updates on proceedings before the NCLAT
  • NCLAT hearing on March 19, 2026, with adjournment granted
  • Matter listed for submissions and further proceedings on April 10, 2026
  • Impugned NCLT order admitting CIRP remains stayed
  • Company remains fully operational and financially sound

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIABULLS REAL ESTATE LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [BLUSPRING] Bluspring Enterprises Ltd Subsidiary to Acquire 100% Share Capital of STEAG Energy Services (India) Private Limited for INR 180,00,00,000
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bluspring Enterprises Limited's wholly owned subsidiary, Bluspring New Horizon One Private Limited, has executed a Share Purchase Agreement with STEAG Energy GmbH and STEAG Energy Services (India) Private Limited for the acquisition of 100% of the paid-up share capital of SESI on a fully diluted basis. The transaction is not a related party transaction and is expected to be margin and EPS accretive, enhancing the return on equity profile. The acquisition is subject to approval from the Competition and Consumer Authority of Botswana and is expected to be completed within 120 days. SESI is a leading provider of operations and maintenance (O&M), digital solutions, and end-to-end engineering & management advisory services to the conventional and renewable power/ energy industry across India, Botswana, Middle East and other overseas markets.

  • Bluspring New Horizon One Private Limited to acquire 100% of STEAG Energy Services (India) Private Limited
  • Transaction value is INR 180,00,00,000
  • Not a related party transaction
  • Expected to be margin and EPS accretive
  • Subject to approval from the Competition and Consumer Authority of Botswana

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bluspring Enterprises Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Subsidiary Commissions 4 MW of 100 MW Wind Power Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Solar Holdings Limited announced that its subsidiary, ACME Eco Clean Energy Private Limited, has successfully commissioned an additional 4 MW out of the 100 MW wind power project. The project is located at Village: Titoda, Taluka: Sayla, Dist: Surendranagar, Gujarat. The commissioning has been confirmed by Gujarat Energy Development Agency (GEDA) and Paschim Gujarat Vij Company Limited (PGVCL) officials. The formal certificate is awaited. This achievement brings the total commissioned capacity to 88 MW out of 100 MW.

  • ACME Solar's subsidiary commissions 4 MW of a 100 MW wind power project in Gujarat
  • The commissioning has been confirmed by GEDA and PGVCL officials
  • The total commissioned capacity now stands at 88 MW out of 100 MW
  • Formal certificate for the commissioning is expected shortly
  • The project is located at Village: Titoda, Taluka: Sayla, Dist: Surendranagar, Gujarat

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [HEROMOTOCO] Hero MotoCorp Designates Chief Quality Officer as Senior Management Personnel
item.description:
Pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, Hero MotoCorp Ltd. has designated Mr. Manish Srivastava, Chief Quality Officer (CQO), as senior management personnel, effective from April 1, 2026. Mr. Srivastava has been associated with Hero MotoCorp for over ten years and brings with him more than three decades of extensive experience across the automobile and engineering sectors. He is an engineering graduate from National Institute of Technology, Durgapur and has been serving as National Head – Service at Hero MotoCorp before being designated as Chief Quality Officer since September 2023.

  • Hero MotoCorp designates Mr. Manish Srivastava as senior management personnel
  • Mr. Srivastava has over three decades of experience in automobile and engineering sectors
  • He is an engineering graduate from National Institute of Technology, Durgapur
  • Mr. Srivastava has been associated with Hero MotoCorp for over ten years
  • He was previously serving as National Head – Service at Hero MotoCorp and designated as Chief Quality Officer since September 2023

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HERO MOTOCORP LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ANDHRACEMT] Sagar Cements Sells 7.24% Stake in Andhra Cements to Achieve Minimum Public Shareholding
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sagar Cements Limited, a promoter of Andhra Cements Limited, has sold 66,76,843 equity shares of Andhra Cements having a face value of 10/- each. This sale represents 7.24% of the total issued and paid-up equity share capital of the company and was conducted through a stock exchange mechanism in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/P/CIR/2023/18 dated February 3, 2023. The purpose of this sale was to achieve the Minimum Public Shareholding requirements as stipulated under rules 19(2)(b) and 19A of the Securities Contracts (Regulation) Rules 1957, read with Regulation 38 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. With this sale, the shareholding of the Promoter in the Company has reduced from 82.24% to 75% of the paid-up equity share capital of the Company and the shareholding of public has increased to 25%, thereby achieving the Minimum Public Shareholding requirements.

  • Sagar Cements sells 7.24% stake in Andhra Cements
  • Sale conducted through stock exchange mechanism
  • Sale aimed to achieve Minimum Public Shareholding requirements
  • Promoter shareholding reduced from 82.24% to 75%
  • Public shareholding increased to 25%, achieving Minimum Public Shareholding requirements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ANDHRA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [DELHIVERY] Delhivery Ltd Appoints Ms. Neelam Dhawan as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director and Chairperson of the Board
item.description:
Delhivery Ltd has appointed Ms. Neelam Dhawan as an Additional Director under the category of Non-Executive Independent Director for a term of five years, subject to the approval of shareholders. Ms. Dhawan will also be designated as the Chairperson of the Board of Directors, effective April 1, 2026. Ms. Dhawan is an experienced professional with a background in managing complex technology businesses in highly matrixed organizations. She is currently an Independent Director on the Boards of several companies and has been recognized as one of the Most Powerful Women in Business by leading business journals.

  • Delhivery Ltd appoints Ms. Neelam Dhawan as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Ms. Dhawan to serve as Chairperson of the Board of Directors from April 1, 2026
  • Ms. Dhawan's term is for five years, subject to shareholder approval
  • Ms. Dhawan has extensive experience in managing complex technology businesses across various industries
  • Ms. Dhawan is currently an Independent Director on the Boards of several companies

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Delhivery Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [INFY*] Infosys Ltd Completes Incorporation of Step-Down Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Australia
item.description:
Infosys Ltd has completed the incorporation of a step-down wholly owned subsidiary in Australia named Infosys Enterprise Business Services Pty. Ltd. This subsidiary operates in the Information Technology and Information Technology enabled Services industry. Infosys Singapore Pte. Ltd., a step-down wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited, holds 100% of the shareholding in the new subsidiary.

  • Infosys Ltd incorporates a step-down wholly owned subsidiary in Australia
  • Subsidiary named Infosys Enterprise Business Services Pty. Ltd
  • Operates in Information Technology and Information Technology enabled Services industry
  • 100% shareholding held by Infosys Singapore Pte. Ltd

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INFOSYS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [WINDMACHIN] Windsor Machines Ltd. Announces Scheme of Amalgamation with Global CNC Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Windsor Machines Ltd. has announced a scheme of amalgamation with its wholly owned subsidiary, Global CNC Private Limited. The scheme has been sanctioned by the National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench. The scheme will be effective upon filing of a certified copy of the Order with the Registrar of Companies.

  • Windsor Machines Ltd. announces a scheme of amalgamation with Global CNC Private Limited.
  • Global CNC Private Limited is a wholly owned subsidiary of Windsor Machines Ltd.
  • The scheme has been sanctioned by the National Company Law Tribunal, Ahmedabad Bench.
  • The scheme will be effective upon filing of a certified copy of the Order with the Registrar of Companies.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WINDSOR MACHINES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PERSISTENT] Persistent Systems Appoints Hari Abhyankar as Executive Vice President - Private Equity and Professional Services
item.description:
Persistent Systems Ltd. has appointed Mr. Hari Abhyankar as the Executive Vice President (EVP) - Private Equity and Professional Services and Senior Management Personnel (SMP) with effect from Thursday, March 19, 2026 (PST). Mr. Abhyankar is a seasoned leader with expertise in leveraging technology and artificial intelligence to drive business transformation. He brings extensive experience as a former Partner at McKinsey & Company and as a hands-on executive with significant P&L responsibility. He has led transformation initiatives across sales, marketing, product, and revenue operations. Mr. Abhyankar holds a PhD from MIT, providing a strong analytical foundation to enable practical enterprise adoption of AI.

  • Persistent Systems Ltd. appoints Hari Abhyankar as Executive Vice President - Private Equity and Professional Services
  • Mr. Abhyankar is a seasoned leader with expertise in leveraging technology and artificial intelligence
  • He brings extensive experience as a former Partner at McKinsey & Company and as a hands-on executive
  • He has led transformation initiatives across sales, marketing, product, and revenue operations
  • Mr. Abhyankar holds a PhD from MIT, providing a strong analytical foundation

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PERSISTENT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Management Change
